name: Dynamic Drill and Blast Holdings Limited
summary: Dynamic Drill and Blast Holdings Limited provides drilling and blasting services for mining and construction sectors in Western Australia. It offers drilling and blasting services to break rock for excavation; and ancillary services, such as blast hole, wall control, depressurization, and probe drilling, as well as mining and quarrying blasting, controlled blasting, and vibration and overpressure monitoring services. The company also provides equipment and labor hiring services. It operates a fleet of 13 drilling rigs. Dynamic Drill and Blast Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in Wangara, Australia.
